transcript.content: My manager took credit for my idea again today.
That's a great idea !
Wait, I think you misunderstood. It's not a good thing. This is actually the third time this has happened, and it feels like no one ever notices that the work is mine.
I see . I wonder if there's a way to reverse this ?
I don't think there's any reversing it at this point. I guess I just feel invisible at that job.
Yeah , that's the joke .
It's really not a joke to me. It's just exhausting. Like what's even the point of trying hard or putting in extra effort if it's never going to be seen anyway?
Oh .
Yeah. Anyway, it just happened again right now in our afternoon wrap-up meeting. Same exact thing, they just ran with my suggestion like it was theirs and I'm left sitting there in silence.
(no response generated)
Look, I know I probably sound like a broken record at this point, but it's just this one constant thing that is really bugging me and making me want to completely check out.
good

Good? How is me wanting to completely check out from my job a 'good' thing? I'm trying to explain how incredibly frustrating it is to have my hard work stolen and ignored, and it feels like you're not even taking this seriously.
s

Are you even listening to me? I'm sitting here feeling completely deflated because my manager constantly steals my work, and your responses are just 'good' and 's'? It's like I can't get anyone to actually hear me, not at work and apparently not here either.
maybe

"Maybe"? Are you kidding me? This is exactly what I'm talking about. I'm trying to open up about how frustrating and exhausting it is to be completely overlooked, and I'm just getting one-word, dismissive answers. It's like my voice doesn't matter anywhere.
horizontity . .that's's horizont

Are you literally just typing random words now? 'Horizontity'? I came here to vent because I'm incredibly stressed and tired of being treated like a ghost by my boss, and instead of any actual support, I'm getting gibberish. This is so incredibly frustrating.
this

"This"? "This" what? Seriously, this is unbelievable. First my manager steals my ideas and makes me feel like a ghost, and now I can't even get a coherent response from a support tool. It really feels like a sick joke today. Is there anyone actual behind this, or are you just glitching out completely while I'm trying to deal with this stress?
That's

That's what? You can't even finish a sentence. It is so incredibly draining to be in this headspace where I'm already feeling completely worthless and ignored at my job, and then I try to get some of this frustration out and I'm met with literally nothing but fragmented words. It just makes me feel even more shut out.
(no response generated)

And now you've just stopped replying altogether? Unbelievable. I guess it really is fitting. I get completely silenced and ignored by my manager at work all day, and then when I try to talk about it here, I get met with complete silence too. It’s like the universe is just reinforcing that my voice doesn't matter.
welf

"Welf"? What is that even supposed to mean? I'm honestly at a loss. I'm dealing with so much anxiety and frustration over this job, feeling like an absolute ghost who gets no credit for their own mind, and you're just throwing random letter combinations at me. It's like my feelings and my situation are just a joke to everyone.
horizontals .

"Horizontals." Honestly, I don't even know why I'm still trying to explain this. I'm sitting here completely stressed out, venting about my manager taking credit for my hard work yet again, and you are literally just throwing broken words at me. It's just a perfect reflection of how my entire day has gone—just talking into a void where nothing I say actually registers to anyone.
advocadesmanship
